heading: Today
text: Scattered rain showers. A hint of sun south. Steady rain late.
temperature: 50s to 60, except 30s and 40s in the St. Lawrence Valley and northeast

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Rain, some snow in the St. Lawrence late.
temperature: 25 to 30 St. Lawrence to 40s in NH

heading: Thursday
text: Rain/snow showers changing to snow showers, mainly morning.
